_publications._publicationTitle: A Systematic Assessment of Accuracy in Detecting Somatic Mosaic Variants by Deep Amplicon Sequencing: Application to NF2 Gene.

_contextSnippet: A mean number of 118842 reads were obtained for each sample. The mean median coverage per sample was 1121X ranging from 14X to 2045X
details: Mean number of 118842 reads obtained per sample with mean median coverage of 1121X ranging from 14X to 2045X
